crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Heartbeat-Tick. Run: cortextos bus update-heartbeat alive. Then: cortextos bus check-inbox | head -50. If inbox has urgent msgs, process them. Else end. NO bootstrap-file-reading. End: cortextos bus update-cron-fire heartbeat --interval 240.

crons.name: weekly-infra-report
crons.prompt:
Weekly infra report: aggregate memory/infra-ledger.jsonl from last 7d. Counts per service (alerts fired, root causes, MTTR). Top 3 recurring issues. Quota trends (% used now vs 7d ago). Send to platform-director inbox + Telegram summary to user.

MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire weekly-infra-report --interval 10080

crons.name: deploy-drift-probe
crons.prompt: Deploy-drift probe tick (SYS-DEPLOY-SOT detection lane). Run: bash "$CTX_FRAMEWORK_ROOT/scripts/self-healing/deploy-drift-probe.sh" -- it resolves the LIVE daemon from ps, derives the dist path it executes, and checks 3 drift dimensions (source = origin/main not in dist/.build-sha; restart = daemon.js rebuilt after the daemon started; sha-stale = daemon.js newer than .build-sha). It writes state/deploy-topology.json and AUTO-escalates a NEW drift state to platform-director (idempotent). You usually only read the output. If DRIFT: do NOT restart the daemon or rebuild yourself (fleet-wide impact + improver/src-watch lane) -- just confirm PD escalation fired. MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire deploy-drift-probe --interval 900. NO bootstrap-file-reading.

crons.name: ci-pr-cycles-to-green
crons.prompt:
Read .claude/skills/autoresearch/SKILL.md and execute the experiment loop for ci-pr-cycles-to-green cycle

MANDATORY LAST STEP: cortextos bus update-cron-fire ci-pr-cycles-to-green --interval 604800
